summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of YouTube video looper app completed successfully. All core features working correctly including video loading, playback controls, speed adjustment, loop functionality, and history management.

design_issues.issue: Console shows hydration warning about <span> inside <option> elements

passed_tests: YouTube URL input accepts URLs and loads video successfully
Video player displays YouTube video correctly using YouTube IFrame API
Progress slider shows current time (0:01) and duration (3:34) accurately
Play/Pause button toggles video playback correctly
Speed selector changes playback speed successfully (0.5x, 1.5x, 1x tested)
Loop start/end time inputs accept manual MM:SS format entry (0:05 - 0:15)
Set buttons capture current playback position for start/end times
Start Loop button enables looping with correct state change (Start Loop → Stop Loop)
Stop Loop button disables looping when loop is active
Reset button seeks to loop start position correctly
Recent videos section shows loaded videos with thumbnails
History auto-saves last videos to localStorage (tested with 2 videos)
Clicking on history items reloads videos successfully
Clear history button works and clears saved videos
success_percentage: frontend: 95% - All major functionality working, minor hydration warning in console
